ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employer posting the job */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the job is based */,
  "position_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position type */,
  "core_competency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the core competency required for the job */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the employer */,
  "remote_work" INTEGER /* Whether the job allows remote work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_core_competency_id FOREIGN KEY ("core_competency_id") REFERENCES core_competencies ("core_competency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_position_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_type_id") REFERENCES position_types ("position_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about job postings */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the employer operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the employer's company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Employer's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the job is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the job location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the job location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the job location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position_types" (
  "position_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position type */,
  "position_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the position type (e.g., Data Scientist, Web Developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_competencies" (
  "core_competency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core competency */,
  "competency_name" TEXT /* Name of the core competency (e.g., Statistical Analysis, Ruby) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the core competency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_competency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the candidate is based */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* Candidate's LinkedIn profile URL */,
  "github_profile" TEXT /* Candidate's GitHub profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate applying for the job */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Candidate's cover letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employer, candidate, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate possessing the skill */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "job_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job skill requirement */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill required for the job */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance of the skill for the job (e.g., required, preferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_skills_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the interview is for */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date the interview is scheduled for */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES interviewers ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the interviewer */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employer the interviewer works for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviewers_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interview the rating is for */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the candidate (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_ratings_interview_id FOREIGN KEY ("interview_id") REFERENCES interviews ("interview_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the job posting received */,
  "applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications the job posting received */,
  "click_through_rate" TEXT /* Click-through rate of the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_analytics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
